# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: flask-api-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3 # High availabilty
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: flask-api # High availabilty
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: flask-api # High availability
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: flask-app
          image: yusufarslan/flask-web-api

# https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment/#creating-a-replicationcontroller-object
